title: Polyphlebium philippianum
taxonomy: Polyphlebium philippianum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to the Philippines and belongs to the genus Polyphlebium. Polyphlebium philippianum is a type of filmy fern, characterized by its delicate and lacy fronds. The classification of Polyphlebium philippianum is further supported by its unique morphological features and molecular phylogenetic analysis. As a member of the Hymenophyllaceae family, Polyphlebium philippianum is closely related to other filmy ferns found in tropical regions.
